xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: A.B.Road, Village- Nimrani, Tehsil Kasrawad, District Khargone Madhya Pradesh, India, 451569
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: The B Zone, 7th Floor, Pipliya Kumar, Nipania Main Road- Indore- 453771 (M.P)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Manufacture of Straight Inorganic Fertilizers. (Single Super Phosphate)
Manufacture of nitric acid, ammonia, commercial ammonium chloride, nitrates of potassium and other basic chemicals of nitrogenous fertilizer industry. (Sulphuric Acid)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Company serves SSP Fertilizer, Sulphuric Acid and Other Specialty Chemicals directly as well as through Co-operative Societies and Dealers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarksStakeHolderGroupFromWho: Grievances are Redressed by RTA & Company
Grievances are Redressed by RTA & Company.
Grievances are Redressed by RTA & Company
Grievances are Redressed by RTA & Company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Rock & Sulphur is the main ingredient for manufacturing of Fertilizer, shortage of raw material impact on the manufacturing of the product.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: We are trying to store the raw material to mitigate this issue. Also we have purchase rock from India as well as outside the country.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Fertilizer Industry mainly depends on monsoon, delay in monsoon causes poor sales.
Delay in Government Subsidy by Various reasons
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Based upon the government subsidy rate finalized, market price of the product is determined after considering other miscellaneous factors.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePoliciesExplanator:

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: Performance of each of the principle is reviewed periodically by the various committees led by the Management and Board of the Directors.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT:
CSR Committee of the Board is looking into the Sustainability related issues. Composition of CSR Committee as on date are as follows:
1. Utsav Khaitan (03021454): Chairman, Whole Time Director 2. Inder Jit Singh (10558389): Member, Independent, Non-executive 3. Deepak Kumar Khemka (01673395): Member, Independent, Non-executive 4.Payal Gupta (10628052): Member, Independent, Non-executive
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfOtherFrequencyFor: As a practice, policies of the Company are reviewed periodically or on a need basis by the Management. During this assessment, the efficacy of the policies is reviewed and necessary changes to policies and procedures are implemented

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Matters relating to the business, regulations, economy and environmental, social and governance parameters
Matters relating to the business, regulations, economy and environmental, social and governance parameters
Workshop on Communication Skills / Technical Skill Development
Mock Drills and Fire Safety trainings done on all units Separately
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Company have received notice/penalty from the Stock Exchanges due to non-compliance of Reg. 17(1A) of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015 w.r.t. Company has appointed non-executive director who has attained the age of seventy-five years without a special resolution is been passed to that effect.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: Boards of Directors of the company are governed by code of business conduct and ethics which also provide for detailed provisions on conflict of interest
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: Installation of Pollution Control equipments and ensuring zero discharge from factory. Solid/hazardous waste are disposed to authorised agencies. Gases emission are monitored by online monitoring systems.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Each Manufacturing unit has a HR welfare Department including the Business head Office.
Each Manufacturing unit has a HR welfare Department including the Business head Office.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: The Safety & Health Management system covers activities across all manufacturing locations and offices.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: The Company has a process for Risk Management which is essential for preventing accidents, injuries, occupational disease, emergency control & prevention and business continuity. Considering the hazards associated with operations and hazardous chemicals used, sites have deployed structured Hazard Assessment, Risk Assessment and Management Process - both qualitative and quantitative which is regularly reviewed and mitigation plans are put in place for high-risk areas. The process also considers roles and responsibilities, monitoring control measures, competency training and awareness of individuals associated with such activities. Formal risk assessment training has been provided as appropriate
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Company’s commitment to its safety management programmes follows a top-down approach with the senior management persistently working towards establishing, demonstrating, sustaining and improving the safety culture and incorporating the Company’s core value of safety in their daily responsibilities. The employees are specially trained to tackle any potential hazards that may arise in the course of their work. Additionally, tailored periodic medical check-ups are administered to the Company’s employees, based on the risk profile of their work area, to identify risks to human health. Adequate medical facilities are present at all manufacturing sites and specialized medical facilities are provided through tie-ups with other hospitals, nursing homes, etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: All critical factors involved in an incident are determined through root cause analysis & investigation and corrective / preventive actions are identified to prevent recurrence. The detailed investigation and root causes identified by cross-functional team are reviewed by the Senior Management. Learning from incident is further discussed in the morning safety meeting, toolbox talk, safety committee meet, contractor communication meet, etc. to bring awareness and prevent recurrence of incidents.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Senior Management determines internal and external group of stakeholders which has immediate impact on the company, this include shareholder, employees, customers, suppliers, bankers and Government
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: The Company management regularly interacts with key stakeholders i.e. investors, customers, suppliers, employees, banker and government etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: On the basis of Stakeholders consultation future policies related to environment and social topics are determined
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: Companies’ constant endeavor is to focus on inclusive and collaborative growth. Company tries to provide entry level recruitment to people belonging to vulnerable section of the society
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Annual General Meeting, Shareholder Meetings, email, Stock Exchange (SE) intimations, Annual Report, Quarterly Results, Newspaper Publication Company / SE Website
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Share price appreciation, dividends, profitability and financial stability,
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Inter Office Memo, Circulars and Email
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Operational efficiencies, communication, health, safety and engagement initiatives.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Website, Email, Post, Pamphlets and Website
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Product quality and availability, responsiveness to needs, after sales Support.
Sharing Financial Position and taking financial assistance.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Reported grievances are reviewed and proper enquiry is made by personal department and findings of the same are reported to Senior Management.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: As part of Whistleblower Policy and POSH Policy, the Company has a section mentioned on the protection of identity of the complainant. All such matters are dealt in strict confidence.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No adverse cases came up during the assessment by the entity.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: No such grievances on Human Rights violations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: No such due diligence conducted yet.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyThatUnd: State electricity boards. We have installed electric meters on our captive power generators.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyInCaseA: We have installed water meters on incoming raw water pipe lines.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: On line PTZ camera and flow meters are installed to ensure Zero Liquid Discharge conditions under all conditions and real time data are communicated to CPCB/SPCB, servers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyIfAnyIn: We have installed necessary air pollution control equipment for Single super phosphate fertilizer and Sulphuric acid plants along with on line stack monitoring instruments for SO2, F, PM as per requirement of CPCB/respective SPCB,s. These systems are on line connected to CPCB/SPCB servers for real time monitoring air pollution parameters. We have provided tripping interlocks to process plants with these instruments; therefore, there is no adverse impact to air environment
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: We are using waste heat generated during production of Sulfuric Acid for producing electricity through Steam Turbine
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: We have adapted the policy of using chromium free chemicals for water treatments processes i.e. chemicals used in cooling towers are free from chromium and other heavy metals. We are complying with all conditions of Hazardous Waste Authorization issued by SPCB’s.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TypeOfOperations: Manufacture SSP fertilizer , Sulphuric acid and captive power generation based on waste heat
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameAndBriefDetailsOfProject: Expansion project for increasing sulphuric acid capacity and 600 TPD GSSP plant
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:EIANotificationNumber: F-No IA-J-11011/172/2020-IA-11(I) from MOEF New Delhi
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSignificantDirectAndI: There is no adverse impact to air environment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureWebLinkOfEntityAtWhi: - Disaster management plan covers all activities of operations. Gases emission are monitored by online monitoring systems with tripping and alarms in case of adverse situation. - All our units are having zero liquid discharge conditions. - All solid/hazardous waste are disposed to authorised agencies only. - All our units are having occupational health centers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseAnySignificantAdverseI: No significant impact on environment. Environment aspects and impacts have been studied for all activities of entity
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: We have installed DCS process control systems in SSP plant to optimize specific rock and Sulphuric acid consumptions
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OutcomeOfTheInitiative: Optimized rock and Sulphuric acid specific consumptions for SSP manufacturing
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Provided interlock systems on online SO2/F/PM stack monitors for tripping process in case if permissible limit is crossed
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheArea: Nimrani, Dahej, Nimbaheda, Jhansi, Malwan, Somni
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: Customers complain are received through email/post, depending upon the nature of complain, the matter is then discussed with head of relevant departments.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePolicyOnCyberSecur: The Company has adequate Safeguard System i.e. Firewall & alternate data storage on cloud.
